message:
fix(algorithms): map CgseValue::Int to GraphML "long" to match NX type system

NetworkX's construct_types() maps Python int → "long" (last-wins dict
ordering), not "int". This caused GraphML type inference to emit
attr.type="int" where NX emits attr.type="long". Cross-validated:
age=30 now correctly produces "long", weight=1.5 produces "double",
matching NX output exactly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
